purpose: Canonical feeding manifest for the joint H(z)+DESI DR2 BAO+fσ8+CMB-shift likelihood.
claim_boundary: Only committed, traceable local inputs are listed. Missing external full products are not fabricated.

inputs.notes: Materialized H(z) table with source tags per row.

inputs.error_policy: 13x13 covariance reconstructed from committed diagonal errors plus same-bin DM/DH correlations; BGS DV remains diagonal.
inputs.notes: Full external DESI supplement remains an external heavy archive; this manifest uses the committed primary likelihood table and committed covariance summary.
Seven-point growth table already used by the Structure-D validation tests.

failsafe.rollback: If a downstream check fails after output replacement, restore the paired *.bak artifact written beside the output file.
